creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot recreate this. The options all seem to work fine.

```
TcpRcvBufPoll yes
HPNDisabled no
HPNBufferSize 2048
NoneEnabled no
Ciphers aes256-gcm@openssh.com,chacha20-poly1305@openssh.com,aes256-cbc,aes192-cbc,aes128-cbc,none
```

This started up:

root@exp-10i386-commit-test:~ # service openssh onerestart
Performing sanity check on openssh configuration.
Stopping openssh.
Waiting for PIDS: 26232.
Performing sanity check on openssh configuration.
Starting openssh.

root@exp-10i386-commit-test:~ # ps uaxw
USER   PID %CPU %MEM   VSZ  RSS TT  STAT STARTED    TIME COMMAND
root 26642  0.0  0.0 12608 4396  -  IsJ   9:49PM 0:00.00 /usr/local/sbin/sshd
